[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Emergency HVAC Repair Signals Consumer Stress Lifting XLY",
    "family": "consumer_stress",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly HVAC emergency repair search volume",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "A sudden weekly spike in emergency HVAC repair searches indicates rising consumer stress and likely increased discretionary spending on urgent home services.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Consumer urgency on home repairs often drives discretionary sector strength."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter long XLY when weekly HVAC emergency repair search volume rises 15% over prior 3-week average",
      "exit": "Exit after 4 weeks or when search volume falls below prior 3-week average",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 18,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Weekly search volume for emergency HVAC repair fluctuates seasonally and on weather-related stress, causing multiple spikes annually."
  },
